title: White dog setup
goal: Establish the white dog in a clean, minimal hero composition before eating begins.

title: White dog ready to eat
goal: Hold the same composition as the dog focuses on the food, preserving continuity into the next shot.

title: Eating begins
goal: Show the white dog taking the first bite in the same simple setup, just before the shift.

title: Nearly invisible transformation
goal: Capture the eating beat as the coat color changes subtly and almost imperceptibly from white to black.

title: Black dog reveal
goal: Present the transformed black dog in the same minimal environment as the payoff frame.

title: Black dog holds
goal: Let the final black dog image land cleanly as the closing beat.
